mapper.sql: id, name, `condition`, action, priority, enabled, version, version_comment, created_at, updated_at
id, rule_id, version, name, `condition`, action, priority, enabled, version_comment, created_by, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule (id, name, `condition`, action, priority, enabled, version, version_comment) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{condition}, #{action}, #{priority}, #{enabled}, #{version}, #{versionComment})
mapper.update: UPDATE rule SET name = #{name}, `condition` = #{condition}, action = #{action}, priority = #{priority}, enabled = #{enabled}, version = #{version}, version_comment = #{versionComment} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM rule ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM rule WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE rule SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{ruleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_history (rule_id, version, name, `condition`, action, priority, enabled, version_comment, created_by) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{version}, #{name}, #{condition}, #{action}, #{priority}, #{enabled}, #{versionComment}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY version DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE rule r INNER JOIN rule_history h ON r.id = h.rule_id SET r.name = h.name, r.`condition` = h.`condition`, r.action = h.action, r.priority = h.priority, r.enabled = h.enabled, r.version = h.version, r.version_comment = CONCAT('回滚到版本 ', h.version) WHERE r.id = #{ruleId} AND h.version = #{version}
